title: March 22
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 22''' is the 81st day of the year (82nd in leap years). There are 284 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Tony Pope]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Alex Irvine]] is born.
*[[1976]] – Shooting begins on [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 7|''Star Wars Weekly'' 7]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 144|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 144]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 16|''Star Wars'' (1998) 16]] published.
*2000 – ''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] platform.
*[[2005]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 22]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2005 – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]] released.
*[[2011]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars III: The Clone Wars]]'' released.
*2011 – ''[[The Old Republic: Deceived]]'' published.
*2011 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars III: The Clone Wars: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Outer Rim Territories|Outer Rim]] DLC released for ''[[Star Wars Battlefront]]''.
*[[2017]] – [[Darth Maul (2017) 2|''Darth Maul'' (2017) 2]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Luke vs. Imperial Walkers - Commander on Hoth]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Explosives, Heavy Weapons, and Power Sources]]'' published in Mexico.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian Colortivity: Good Luck with the Child]]'' to be published.
*[[2023]] – "[[Tipping Point]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – "[[Chapter 20: The Foundling]]" airs on Disney+.
*2023 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 32|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 32]] published.
<noinclude>
